title: crotalaria evolvuloides
intro: Crotalaria evolvuloides, also known as the false bindweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria evolvuloides include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, including tonics and ointments.
